name: Cedar Ridge Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Cedar Ridge Middle School in Sandy, OR! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Dalzell Community Gym
description: Dalzell Community Gym is a place to play pickleball in Damascus, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $20 per court per hour

name: Estacada First Baptist Church
description: Estacada First Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Estacada, OR. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

description: Estacada Junior High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Estacada, OR. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: First Baptist Church Of Canby
description: First Baptist Church Of Canby is a place to play pickleball in Canby, OR. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are private.

name: Grace Chapel
description: Grace Chapel is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wilsonville, OR. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Private — Optional $5 to Heart of the City

name: Hammerle Park
description: Hammerle Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in West Linn, OR. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Happy Valley Park
description: 2 tennis/pickleball courts. The adjacent basketball court has a wall for practicing too.

name: Hillendale Park
description: Hillendale Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oregon City, OR. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Lake Oswego Indoor Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Oswego Indoor Tennis Center in Lake Oswego, OR! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and trainers or lessons. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Lake Oswego Recreation & Aquatics Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Oswego Recreation & Aquatics Center in Lake Oswego, OR! There are 3 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, adaptive programming, food, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Schedule subject to change due to programming.
fees: Fee required — One-time fee or membership required.

name: Lake Oswego Senior High School - North Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Oswego Senior High School - North Courts in Lake Oswego, OR! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Max Patterson Park
description: Club hours open play Mon. thru Sat. 9 to noon.  Nets available to club members only.  $5 drop-in fee for non-members.  All other hour's courts are first come first serve.  Non-members must supply their own equipment outside of club hours.

description: Come play pickleball at O’Brien Oasis in Wilsonville, OR! There is 1 outdoor court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.
